name: Fujifilm Instax Wide 400 Instant Film Camera
description: Capture your favorite moments with friends and family using the INSTAX WIDE 400 Instant Film Camera from FUJIFILM, designed to make group photos a breeze with a newly-incorporated self-timer dial and a camera angle adjustment accessory.

features.Key Features:: Uses FUJIFILM INSTAX Instant Color Film | Image Size: 2.4 x 3.9" | Retractable 95mm f/14 Lens | Self-Timer up to 10s | 0.37x Optical Viewfinder and Target Spot | Automatic Exposure & Programmed Shutter | Built-In Flash | Close-Up Lens Adapter Included | Angle Adjustment Accessory Included | Runs on 4 AA Batteries | FUJIFILM INSTAX WIDE 400 Instant Film Camera | Shoulder Strap | Close-Up Lens | Camera Angle Adjustment Accessory | 4 x AA Battery
